chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-536 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objections. For hearing of MA No.2165/2026. For hearing of main case. 09.04.2026 Mr. Atif Imran Khowaja advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. Sindh along with I.O. of the case SIP Muhammad Arif. The petitioners are present along with their learned counsel. Petitioner No.1, Mst. Farzana, submits that she being sui juris has contracted a lawful marriage with petitioner No.2, Zakir Hussain of her own free will and consent without any coercion or compulsion. It is further contended that respondent No.4, the father of petitioner No.1, being aggrieved by the said marriage, has lodged FIR No.37 of 2026 at Police Station Tando Ghulam Ali, District Badin, under Sections 365-B and 34 PPC. Today, the Investigating Officer is present and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C., wherein she has reiterated the aforesaid facts and has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR regarding kidnapping or wrongful confinement. In view of the statement of the alleged abductee, the Investigating Officer submits that he shall submit a report under Section 173 Cr.P.C. before the learned concerned Magistrate within seven days, for seeking appropriate orders in accordance with law. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms, along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
